templates.name: Auto Skip YouTube Ads
templates.description: Automatically skips YouTube ads by clicking the skip button, closing overlay ads, and speeding through unskippable ads. Handles pre-roll, mid-roll, and overlay ad formats.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Auto Skip YouTube Ads
scripts.description: Monitors the YouTube player for ads and automatically skips them. Clicks the skip button when available, closes overlay ads, and speeds through unskippable ads.
